misc.title: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an av
misc.text: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an average temperature of 29.8°C Around 40 people are confirmed to have drowned while swimming in efforts to cool down. (theguardian.com/world/2026/j…) Community note: The 29.8°C is France's national average of day and night temperatures across 30 weather stations; local highs reached 44.3°C. The 40 drownings occurred over the past week during the heatwave. apnews.com/article/heat-w… bbc.com/news/articles/… — https://nitter.net/PopBase/status/2069754874074398969#m
